VAL-UI-001.evidence: Screenshot VAL-UI-001_landing_page.png shows hero section with 'Your Personal Health Data Vault' heading, feature cards (Interactive Dashboard, Secure Sharing, Complete Audit Trail, You're in Control), How it works section with 3 steps (Connect, Visualize, Share), and sign-up CTA 'Get Started — It's Free' linking to /sign-up. No console errors.

VAL-UI-002.evidence: Clicked 'Get Started' link on landing page hero section. Browser navigated to http://localhost:3000/sign-up. Screenshot VAL-UI-002_get_started_to_signup.png shows the sign-up registration form. No console errors.
VAL-UI-002.notes: The hero section has two 'Get Started' links (header @e3 and hero body @e4); clicked the hero body one which correctly navigates to /sign-up.

VAL-UI-003.evidence: Screenshot VAL-UI-003_sign_in_page.png shows sign-in page at /sign-in with 'Sign in' heading, email address text field, password text field, 'Sign in' button, and 'Sign up' link. No console errors.

VAL-UI-004.evidence: Filled email 'uitest_g1@example.com' and password 'testpass123' on /sign-in, clicked 'Sign in' button. Browser redirected to http://localhost:3000/dashboard. Screenshot VAL-UI-004_dashboard_after_signin.png shows authenticated dashboard with sidebar navigation, user name 'UI Test Group 1', and empty state CTA. No console errors.
VAL-UI-004.notes: Mock auth auto-created the user on first sign-in as expected.

VAL-UI-005.evidence: Screenshot VAL-UI-002_get_started_to_signup.png (same as VAL-UI-002) shows /sign-up page with 'Create your account' heading, Display name field, Email address field, Password field, 'Create account' button, and 'Sign In' link. No console errors.
VAL-UI-005.notes: Sign-up page verified during VAL-UI-002 navigation test.

VAL-UI-040.evidence: While authenticated (signed in as uitest_g1@example.com), navigated to http://localhost:3000/sign-in. Browser immediately redirected to http://localhost:3000/dashboard. Screenshot VAL-UI-040_signin_redirect.png shows the dashboard page confirming the redirect. No console errors.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. Landing page renders correctly with all required sections. Get Started CTA navigates to sign-up. Sign-in and sign-up forms render properly. Sign-in flow authenticates and redirects to dashboard. Authenticated users are redirected from /sign-in to /dashboard.
